description_long: This is a classic black-and-white football, featuring a traditional arrangement of pentagonal and hexagonal panels. The surface is composed of alternating black pentagons and white hexagons, stitched together to form a near-perfect sphere. The seams between the panels are visible, suggesting a stitched construction, and the ball appears to be fully inflated, maintaining a smooth, rounded shape. The material looks like synthetic leather or polyurethane, commonly used for durability and water resistance. There are no visible logos, text, or branding on the surface, and the ball shows no signs of wear, scuffing, or discoloration. The overall appearance is clean and new, suitable for use in parks, playgrounds, or urban sports facilities.
description: A new, classic black-and-white football with stitched pentagonal and hexagonal panels, smooth and clean with no visible branding or wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing a centered black pentagon surrounded by white hexagons and black pentagons, with visible stitching.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the curvature and panel seams, with more black pentagons visible on the left side.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with a black pentagon at the top, showing a similar panel arrangement as view 0.
description_view_3: Angled view similar to view 1, with black pentagons more prominent on the right side.
